name: Prometheus Target Down RCA
description: Query Prometheus for scrape targets currently `up == 0` via openagentic_prometheus.prometheus_query, parse the formatted-text response into a structured down-targets array (one entry per JSON-stringified label dict), correlate each down target back to recent error logs from openagentic_loki.loki_search_errors (filtered to the down namespace), pre-compute per-target log excerpts + HTML rows in a single transform via a labeled merge of analyze + loki_query, ask the platform LLM for a 2-bullet root-cause-analysis per down target referencing concrete log signals, strip any chain-of-thought preamble, then render an HTML RCA report via webhook_response. Empty-cluster case (zero down targets — the operational default in stable clusters) is handled — when the up==0 query returns Results: 0, the report explicitly says 'All targets up' instead of rendering a blank table.

meta.purpose: Investigate which Prometheus scrape targets are currently DOWN (up == 0) and produce a root-cause analysis correlating each down target with its recent error logs.
how_it_works: 1. Queries Prometheus for `up == 0` via openagentic_prometheus.prometheus_query and parses the text payload into a structured down-targets array (one entry per JSON-stringified label dict).
2. Pulls recent error logs from openagentic_loki.loki_search_errors filtered to the affected namespace and time range.
3. A labeled-merge transform joins each down target with its log excerpt and pre-computes the HTML rows.
4. The platform LLM writes a 2-bullet RCA per down target citing concrete log signals (auth failure, network partition, misconfigured endpoint, etc).
5. A CoT-stripper transform removes any LLM preamble.
6. webhook_response renders the HTML RCA report. All-targets-up short-circuit: when zero down targets exist, the report says 'All targets up' instead of a blank table.
meta.expected_output: HTML RCA report with: total down-target count, per-target row containing labels + log excerpt, and a 2-bullet LLM RCA per target.
meta.useful_when: Oncall pages about scrape-target gaps, post-incident verification that monitoring is back to healthy, or daily 'is observability itself healthy?' check.

operations.value: {{ (() => { const text = String(input.content || ''); const lines = text.split(/\r?\n/); const out = []; for (const raw of lines) { const line = String(raw).trim(); if (!line || !line.startsWith('{')) continue; const colonIdx = line.lastIndexOf('}: '); if (colonIdx < 0) continue; const jsonStr = line.slice(0, colonIdx + 1); let metric = null; try { metric = JSON.parse(jsonStr); } catch (e) { continue; } if (!metric || typeof metric !== 'object') continue; const pod_name = String(metric.kubernetes_pod_name || metric.pod || ''); const namespace = String(metric.kubernetes_namespace || metric.namespace || ''); const app = String(metric.app || metric.app_kubernetes_io_name || metric.app_kubernetes_io_instance || ''); const instance = String(metric.instance || ''); const job = String(metric.job || ''); out.push({ pod_name: pod_name, namespace: namespace, app: app, instance: instance, job: job }); } return out; })() }}
{{ (() => { const text = String(input.content || ''); const m = text.match(/Results:\s*(\d+)/i); return m ? parseInt(m[1], 10) : 0; })() }}

{{ (() => { const dts = Array.isArray(input.down_targets) ? input.down_targets : []; if (dts.length === 0) return 'agentic-dev'; for (const t of dts) { if (t && t.namespace) return t.namespace; } return 'agentic-dev'; })() }}

{{ (() => { const dts = Array.isArray(input.down_targets) ? input.down_targets : []; const text = String(input.loki_content || ''); const logLines = text.split(/\r?\n/).filter(l => l && l.startsWith('[')); const result = {}; for (const t of dts) { if (!t || !t.pod_name) continue; const pod = String(t.pod_name); const app = String(t.app || ''); const matched = []; for (const line of logLines) { if (pod && line.indexOf(pod) !== -1) { matched.push(line); } else if (app && app.length > 2 && line.toLowerCase().indexOf(app.toLowerCase()) !== -1) { matched.push(line); } if (matched.length >= 5) break; } if (matched.length === 0) { result[pod] = 'no correlated error logs in window'; } else { result[pod] = matched.join('\n').slice(0, 800); } } return result; })() }}

{{ (() => { const dts = Array.isArray(input.down_targets) ? input.down_targets : []; const lim = (typeof input.limit_label === 'number' && input.limit_label > 0) ? input.limit_label : 5; return dts.slice(0, lim); })() }}
{{ (() => { const ptl = input.per_target_logs || {}; let n = 0; for (const k of Object.keys(ptl)) { if (String(ptl[k] || '').indexOf('no correlated') === -1) n++; } return n; })() }}

{{ (() => { const dts = Array.isArray(input.sliced_targets) ? input.sliced_targets : (Array.isArray(input.down_targets) ? input.down_targets : []); if (dts.length === 0) return 'No down targets — all scrape targets are healthy.'; const esc = s => String(s == null ? '' : s).replace(/&/g, '&').replace(//g, '>'); const ptl = input.per_target_logs || {}; return dts.map(t => { const pod = String(t.pod_name || ''); const logs = String(ptl[pod] || 'no correlated error logs in window'); return `${esc(pod)}${esc(t.app)}${esc(t.namespace)}
${esc(logs.slice(0, 400))}
`; }).join(''); })() }}

{{ (() => { const td = (typeof input.total_down === 'number') ? input.total_down : 0; if (td === 0) return '

All targets up — Prometheus reports zero scrape targets currently down. No RCA needed.

'; return ''; })() }}

data.label: Per-Target RCA
data.prompt:
You are an SRE producing a root-cause-analysis per Prometheus scrape target currently DOWN (up == 0) in namespace {{steps.correlate.namespace_label}}.

Down targets (JSON array of { pod_name, namespace, app, instance, job } — sliced to top {{steps.correlate.limit_label}}; may be empty):
{{steps.correlate.sliced_targets}}

Correlated error logs per target (map pod_name → log excerpt; 'no correlated error logs in window' means the log search returned no matching lines for that pod):
{{steps.correlate.per_target_logs}}

Total targets down: {{steps.correlate.total_down}} ({{steps.correlate.total_correlated}} with correlated logs).

Output rules (MUST follow):
1. Start the response with a single `-` character — no preamble, no "Here is", no "The user wants", no thinking out loud.
2. Exactly ONE bullet per down target (so N bullets total for N down targets), each on its own line, each beginning with `-`.
3. Each bullet references the pod_name verbatim, identifies the likely root cause from the log excerpt (or states 'no correlated logs' if the excerpt is empty), and suggests a concrete operator next-action.
4. If the down_targets array is empty, emit a single bullet stating all scrape targets are up and recommend a routine future check.

data.label: HTML RCA Report
data.bodyTemplate:
Prometheus Target Down RCA — namespace {{steps.correlate.namespace_label}}

Total down targets: {{steps.correlate.total_down}} · Correlated with logs: {{steps.correlate.total_correlated}} · Limit: {{steps.correlate.limit_label}}

{{steps.correlate.all_up_banner}}

Operator RCA (per target)

{{steps.clean_rca.clean_content}}

Per-Target Detail

{{steps.correlate.rows_html}}
PodAppNamespaceCorrelated Log Excerpt
